correction_reason: Aggregate r=0.99 is an artifact. Model predicts ctrl+delta where delta~0 on K562 CRISPRi data. r(pred,stim) == r(ctrl,stim) for all 17 perturbations tested. The model adds zero predictive value over the naive baseline of returning ctrl expression unchanged. This is expected: v1.0 was trained exclusively on IFN-B PBMC data.
interpretation: v1.0 model is IFN-B specific. Its learned perturbation embedding and decoder produce near-zero response on K562 CRISPRi input. Multi-perturbation training (Stage 2+) required for generalisation.
